Mirrors  >  Home  >  MPE Home  >  Th. List  >  on2ind Structured version   Visualization version   GIF version
Theorem on2ind 8639
Description: Double induction over ordinal numbers. (Contributed by Scott Fenton, 26-Aug-2024.)
Hypotheses
Ref Expression
on2ind.1 ⊢ (𝑎 = 𝑐 → (𝜑 ↔ 𝜓))
on2ind.2 ⊢ (𝑏 = 𝑑 → (𝜓 ↔ 𝜒))
on2ind.3 ⊢ (𝑎 = 𝑐 → (𝜃 ↔ 𝜒))
on2ind.4 ⊢ (𝑎 = 𝑋 → (𝜑 ↔ 𝜏))
on2ind.5 ⊢ (𝑏 = 𝑌 → (𝜏 ↔ 𝜂))
on2ind.i ⊢ ((𝑎 ∈ On ∧ 𝑏 ∈ On) → ((∀𝑐 ∈ 𝑎 ∀𝑑 ∈ 𝑏 𝜒 ∧ ∀𝑐 ∈ 𝑎 𝜓 ∧ ∀𝑑 ∈ 𝑏 𝜃) → 𝜑))
Assertion
Ref Expression
on2ind ⊢ ((𝑋 ∈ On ∧ 𝑌 ∈ On) → 𝜂)
Distinct variable groups:   𝑎,𝑏,𝑐,𝑑   𝜓,𝑎   𝜏,𝑎   𝑏,𝑐   𝜒,𝑏   𝑏,𝑑   𝜂,𝑏   𝑐,𝑑   𝜑,𝑐   𝜃,𝑐   𝜓,𝑑   𝑋,𝑎,𝑏   𝑌,𝑏
Allowed substitution hints:   𝜑(𝑎,𝑏,𝑑)   𝜓(𝑏,𝑐)   𝜒(𝑎,𝑐,𝑑)   𝜃(𝑎,𝑏,𝑑)   𝜏(𝑏,𝑐,𝑑)   𝜂(𝑎,𝑐,𝑑)   𝑋(𝑐,𝑑)   𝑌(𝑎,𝑐,𝑑)
Proof of Theorem on2ind
StepHypRef Expression
1 onfr 6385 . 2 ⊢ E Fr On
2 epweon 7758 . . 3 ⊢ E We On
3 weso 5638 . . 3 ⊢ ( E We On → E Or On)
4 sopo 5574 . . 3 ⊢ ( E Or On → E Po On)
52, 3, 4mp2b 10 . 2 ⊢ E Po On
6 epse 5629 . 2 ⊢ E Se On
7 on2ind.1 . 2 ⊢ (𝑎 = 𝑐 → (𝜑 ↔ 𝜓))
8 on2ind.2 . 2 ⊢ (𝑏 = 𝑑 → (𝜓 ↔ 𝜒))
9 on2ind.3 . 2 ⊢ (𝑎 = 𝑐 → (𝜃 ↔ 𝜒))
10 on2ind.4 . 2 ⊢ (𝑎 = 𝑋 → (𝜑 ↔ 𝜏))
11 on2ind.5 . 2 ⊢ (𝑏 = 𝑌 → (𝜏 ↔ 𝜂))
12 predon 7769 . . . . . 6 ⊢ (𝑎 ∈ On → Pred( E , On, 𝑎) = 𝑎)
1312adantr 484 . . . . 5 ⊢ ((𝑎 ∈ On ∧ 𝑏 ∈ On) → Pred( E , On, 𝑎) = 𝑎)
14 predon 7769 . . . . . . 7 ⊢ (𝑏 ∈ On → Pred( E , On, 𝑏) = 𝑏)
1514adantl 485 . . . . . 6 ⊢ ((𝑎 ∈ On ∧ 𝑏 ∈ On) → Pred( E , On, 𝑏) = 𝑏)
1615raleqdv 3320 . . . . 5 ⊢ ((𝑎 ∈ On ∧ 𝑏 ∈ On) → (∀𝑑 ∈ Pred ( E , On, 𝑏)𝜒 ↔ ∀𝑑 ∈ 𝑏 𝜒))
1713, 16raleqbidv 3336 . . . 4 ⊢ ((𝑎 ∈ On ∧ 𝑏 ∈ On) → (∀𝑐 ∈ Pred ( E , On, 𝑎)∀𝑑 ∈ Pred ( E , On, 𝑏)𝜒 ↔ ∀𝑐 ∈ 𝑎 ∀𝑑 ∈ 𝑏 𝜒))
1813raleqdv 3320 . . . 4 ⊢ ((𝑎 ∈ On ∧ 𝑏 ∈ On) → (∀𝑐 ∈ Pred ( E , On, 𝑎)𝜓 ↔ ∀𝑐 ∈ 𝑎 𝜓))
1915raleqdv 3320 . . . 4 ⊢ ((𝑎 ∈ On ∧ 𝑏 ∈ On) → (∀𝑑 ∈ Pred ( E , On, 𝑏)𝜃 ↔ ∀𝑑 ∈ 𝑏 𝜃))
2017, 18, 193anbi123d 1457 . . 3 ⊢ ((𝑎 ∈ On ∧ 𝑏 ∈ On) → ((∀𝑐 ∈ Pred ( E , On, 𝑎)∀𝑑 ∈ Pred ( E , On, 𝑏)𝜒 ∧ ∀𝑐 ∈ Pred ( E , On, 𝑎)𝜓 ∧ ∀𝑑 ∈ Pred ( E , On, 𝑏)𝜃) ↔ (∀𝑐 ∈ 𝑎 ∀𝑑 ∈ 𝑏 𝜒 ∧ ∀𝑐 ∈ 𝑎 𝜓 ∧ ∀𝑑 ∈ 𝑏 𝜃)))
21 on2ind.i . . 3 ⊢ ((𝑎 ∈ On ∧ 𝑏 ∈ On) → ((∀𝑐 ∈ 𝑎 ∀𝑑 ∈ 𝑏 𝜒 ∧ ∀𝑐 ∈ 𝑎 𝜓 ∧ ∀𝑑 ∈ 𝑏 𝜃) → 𝜑))
2220, 21sylbid 242 . 2 ⊢ ((𝑎 ∈ On ∧ 𝑏 ∈ On) → ((∀𝑐 ∈ Pred ( E , On, 𝑎)∀𝑑 ∈ Pred ( E , On, 𝑏)𝜒 ∧ ∀𝑐 ∈ Pred ( E , On, 𝑎)𝜓 ∧ ∀𝑑 ∈ Pred ( E , On, 𝑏)𝜃) → 𝜑))
231, 5, 6, 1, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 22xpord2ind 8128 1 ⊢ ((𝑋 ∈ On ∧ 𝑌 ∈ On) → 𝜂)
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   → wi 4   ↔ wb 208   ∧ wa 399   ∧ w3a 1098   = wceq 1560   ∈ wcel 2142  ∀wral 3076   E cep 5546   Po wpo 5553   Or wor 5554   We wwe 5599  Predcpred 6287  Oncon0 6346
